gates.requirement: Product definition, direct-RC boundary, production identity, and forbidden behavior are explicit.
Exactly 12 unique mono 16-bit PCM WAV files at 44.1 kHz, each non-silent and 0.35-2.10 seconds.
Embedded sound prepares and starts on an Android emulator and emits a bounded sound and volume receipt.
Sound, delay, oracle, and app-local volume use bounded SecureRandom selection.
Execution is user-started, private, mediaPlayback foreground service, visible and stoppable.
Foreground session starts and Portal Seal clears running state.
Portal Seal stops timers, playback, torch, wake lock, notification, and service.
Torch is optional, permission and hardware gated, off by default, and limited to one 180 ms pulse.
No boot receiver, INTERNET permission, analytics, ads, recording, system-volume mutation, or unbounded strobe.
Compile and target SDK 35, min SDK 23, Java 17, Android instrumentation runner.
Release APK installs on an API 35 emulator.
Installed launcher activity starts without immediate crash.
AAB technical candidate exists but private upload signing and Play Console review remain open.
Human-audible quality, speaker routing, rear torch, lock-screen timing, and OEM battery behavior verified on a real phone.
